# UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES
## Periodic Transaction Report

Name: Rohit Khanna. Office telephone appears as 202-225-2631. Filer status: Member of the U.S. House of Representatives, State CA, District 17. IPO question: No checked. Report type: Initial Report checked. Official use stamp: Legislative Resource Center, 2023 SEP -6, Office of the Clerk. Transaction grid contains only the pre-printed example row and the note "Please see the attached"; no real transaction rows appear on this cover page.
uncertainties: Office telephone is degraded by OCR but matches other Rohit Khanna PTR covers as 202-225-2631.
